name: Jiangxi Hongcheng Environment Co.,Ltd.
summary: Jiangxi Hongcheng Environment Co., Ltd. engages in the production and supply of water in China. It is also involved in the operation of sewage treatment plants. The company was formerly known as Jiangxi Hongcheng Waterworks Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Jiangxi Hongcheng Environment Co., Ltd. in February 2021. The company is based in Nanchang, China. Jiangxi Hongcheng Environment Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Nanchang Waterworks Group Ltd.
